subcodes.first_line: O peerless Lord! Make these destitute friends firm and steadfast in the Primordial Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بيمانند اين ياران مستمند را در عهد الست ثابت قدم دار
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant
